rules.rule: Read files COMPLETELY — never use offset/limit on workflow files
Before modifying ANY source file, read its current content first
Before editing shared files (sprint-status.yaml, config), re-read immediately before writing
EXISTING TEST IMPACT: when modifying *.ts/*.tsx, check corresponding *.test.* — fix broken tests immediately
VISUAL VALIDATION: Pencil MCP (design) + Playwright MCP (runtime) for ALL .tsx changes — MANDATORY
Verify .pen file exists at referenced path before using node IDs
Execute continuously — do NOT pause for milestones or session boundaries unless HALT condition
